title: mangifera orophila
intro: Mangifera orophila, also known as the mountain mango or wild mango, is a species of plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mangifera orophila include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and fruit are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
